contentBlocks.original:
वंदे शंभुमुमापतिं सुरगुरुं वंदे जगत् कारणम्
वंदे पन्नगभूषणं शशिधरं वंदे पशूनां पतिम् ।
वंदे सूर्य शशांक वह्नि नयनं वंदे मुकुंद प्रियम्
वंदे भक्तजनाश्रयं च वरदं वंदे शिवंशंकरम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vaṃde śaṃbhumumāpatiṃ suraguruṃ vaṃde jagat kāraṇam
vaṃde pannagabhūṣaṇaṃ śaśidharaṃ vaṃde paśūnāṃ patim .
vaṃde sūrya śaśāṃka vahni nayanaṃ vaṃde mukuṃda priyam
vaṃde bhaktajanāśrayaṃ ca varadaṃ vaṃde śivaṃśaṃkaram ..
contentBlocks.translation: I salute Shambu, Umapati, the preceptor (teacher) of devas, I salute the cause of the earth, I salute the one ornamented with the serpent, the wearer of the moon, I respect that master of all beings. I salute the one with sun, moon, and fire as eyes, I salute the lover of Mukunda, I salute the succour of the devotees, I salute Shiva, the dispenser of welfare.
contentBlocks.meanings: वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; शंभुम् (śaṃbhum) – Shambu; उमापतिम् (umāpatiṃ) – Umapati (umā:Uma | patiṃ:husband); सुरगुरुम् (suraguruṃ) – preceptor of devas (sura:devas | guruṃ:preceptor); वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; जगत् (jagat) – world; कारणम् (kāraṇam) – cause; वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; पन्नगभूषणम् (pannagabhūṣaṇam) – ornamented with serpent (pannaga:serpent | bhūṣaṇam:ornamented); शशिधरम् (śaśidharam) – wearer of the moon (śaśi:moon | dharam:wearer); वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; पशूनाम् (paśūnām) – of all beings; पतिम् (patim) – master; वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; सूर्य (sūrya) – sun; शशांक (śaśāṃka) – moon; वह्नि (vahni) – fire; नयनम् (nayanam) – eyes; वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; मुकुंद (mukuṃda) – Mukunda; प्रियम् (priyam) – lover; वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; भक्तजनाश्रयम् (bhaktajanāśrayam) – succour of devotees (bhakta:devotees | jana:people | āśrayam:succour); च (ca) – and; वरदम् (varadam) – dispenser of welfare; वंदे (vaṃde) – I salute; शिवम् (śivam) – Shiva; शंकरम् (śaṃkaram) – Shankara;
